edges.mechanism: SMXL6 promotes bud outgrowth by repressing BRC1 and promoting PIN1

edges.mechanism: Auxin represses CK biosynthesis via IPT suppression

edges.mechanism: SL reduces PIN7 accumulation; PIN7 over-accumulates in max2

evidence.evidence_sentence: PIN7 over-accumulates compared to wild type in max2 (SL-insensitive)

edges.mechanism: LAS required for focused STM expression in axils via REV

evidence.evidence_sentence: HXK1 promotes branching

edges.mechanism: SL reduces CK levels via transcriptional activation of CKX9

edges.mechanism: Sugar availability suppresses the auxin-induced SL pathway

evidence.evidence_sentence: Sucrose antagonises auxin effect on bud outgrowth dose-dependently, represses bud response to strigolactones

edges.mechanism: D14 hydrolyzes and deactivates SL, acting as both receptor and deactivation enzyme

evidence.title: Strigolactone perception and deactivation by a hydrolase receptor DWARF14
evidence.evidence_sentence: D14 deactivates bioactive SLs by hydrolytic degradation

edges.mechanism: Low nitrogen increases SL biosynthetic gene expression; high nitrogen reduces SL

evidence.evidence_sentence: Low N results in increased auxin export from active shoot apices

edges.mechanism: Auxin depletion after decapitation allows IPT gene expression

evidence.evidence_sentence: PsIPT1 and PsIPT2 were transiently induced 3 h after decapitation

edges.mechanism: BES1 promotes branching by repressing BRC1 cooperatively with SMXLs

evidence.evidence_sentence: bes1-D mutant exhibiting more branching number

edges.mechanism: SL via MAX2 degrades BES1 protein

evidence.evidence_sentence: Both phosphorylated and dephosphorylated BES1s are induced to be degraded by MAX2

evidence.evidence_sentence: Bud n and bud n-2 of aba2-1 had less than 25% of the ABA as the wild type

edges.mechanism: SPS negatively regulates CK; sps loss causes massive overproliferation

edges.mechanism: Type-B ARR1 is a negative regulator of branching; arr1 mutant has increased branching

evidence.evidence_sentence: arr1 single mutant has increased branching forming mean 6.8 rosette branches compared with 5.5

edges.mechanism: SL promotes D14 proteasomal degradation (negative feedback on receptor)

evidence.evidence_sentence: SL destabilizes D14 by promoting its proteasome-mediated degradation
